name: Space Escape
detailed_description:
Space Escape is a rogue-like arcade shoot-'em-up game where survival is the only mission. Forget peaceful space exploration—you're dodging obstacles and blasting alien ships coming at you from every direction. Level up, stack power-ups, and upgrade to take on tougher enemies. Got what it takes to survive the chaos of space? Prove it.

Features:

  • Endless Survival: Fight through infinite waves of enemies and bosses, where every run delivers new twists and turns to keep you on edge.

  • Choose Your Ship: Pick from 4 unique ships (Perhaps some secret ones, as well?), each with their own style and stats. Ready for action!

  • Power Up: Stack over 15 power-ups to boost your ship’s firepower, speed, and abilities. Mix and match for ultimate combos!

  • Arm Yourself: From missiles to laser beams, you’ve got the weapons to turn alien ships into space dust.

  • Upgrade System: Earn credits as you battle through waves, then spend them on a variety of permanent upgrades to boost your firepower, health, and much more!
